commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ffmpeg git ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

set -e; APP_DIR=''; for d in . quickrec_web_server web_server; do if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then APP_DIR="$d"; break; fi; done; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then echo "[railpack] package.json not found, fallback clone quickrec_web_server"; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/tu95/quickrec_web_server.git /tmp/quickrec_web_server; APP_DIR=/tmp/quickrec_web_server; fi; echo "$APP_DIR" > /tmp/railpack_app_dir; cd "$APP_DIR"; if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; else npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi

set -e; APP_DIR=''; if [ -f /tmp/railpack_app_dir ]; then APP_DIR=$(cat /tmp/railpack_app_dir); fi; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then for d in . quickrec_web_server web_server /tmp/quickrec_web_server; do if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then APP_DIR="$d"; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then echo "[railpack] package.json not found for build"; exit 1; fi; cd "$APP_DIR"; npm run build

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc 'set -e; APP_DIR=""; if [ -f /tmp/railpack_app_dir ]; then APP_DIR=$(cat /tmp/railpack_app_dir); fi; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then for d in . quickrec_web_server web_server /tmp/quickrec_web_server; do if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then APP_DIR="$d"; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then echo "[railpack] package.json not found for start"; exit 1; fi; cd "$APP_DIR"; npm run start'
